questions.question: Explain the concept of 'circular economy' and its relation to sustainable waste management. (15 marks)
An e-waste disposal facility is designed to process 500 kg of electronic waste per day. If the facility operates for 20 days, the total amount of e-waste it will handle is: (10 marks)
What are the key characteristics of a 'closed-loop production' system, and how does it contribute to reducing e-waste? (20 marks)
